title: cystopteris fragilis subsp. alpina
intro: Cystopteris fragilis subsp. alpina, also known as Alpine Cystopteris or Alpine Brittle Fern, is a rare and delicate sub-species of the Cystopteris fragilis species of ferns. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to soothe skin irritations and protect against cell damage. The health benefits of Cystopteris fragilis subsp. alpina include its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and salves, and is often harvested in its fresh or dried form.
